_comment: Copy to <NEUROPILOT_DATA_ROOT>/governance/paper_execution_v1_signals.json and set NEUROPILOT_PAPER_EXEC_V1=1 before full pipeline (or run node engine/governance/runPaperExecutionV1.js). For 10 synthetic strategies (metrics V2 / learning), use paper_execution_v1_signals_multi_strategy.example.json + fixtures/README_PAPER_SIGNALS_MULTI.md.
